headline: Why Is Philip Morris (PM) Up 11.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Philip Morris (PM) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Coca-Cola or Philip Morris: Which Is the Better Short Bet Right Now?
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE: KO) and Philip Morris International (NYSE: PM) both posted Q1 2026 beats within a week of each other. Each stock now trades near its 52-week high after sharp rallies. That tension between cautious fundamentals and aggressive price action makes them interesting short candidates to compare. Peak Elasticity Meets a 25x Multiple at Coke ... Coca-Cola or Philip Morris: Which Is the Better Short Bet Right Now?

headline: The S&P Yields 1% - These 3 Stocks Pay You 7x More
summary: As the S&P 500 yield hits 1%, compressed yields at Suncor and Philip Morris challenge high-income buyers. Read why identifying high-yield stocks is difficult.
